issues.detail: Missing coverage of error scenarios and edge cases in onboarding process.
Excessive verbosity leads to potential confusion and longer reading time.
Assumes presence of .claude/product-marketing-context.md, limiting compatibility to Claude-based agents.

scenarios.name: B2B SaaS 7-step setup wizard activation audit
scenarios.rationale: One response gives generic 'shorten the wizard, add a progress bar' advice without naming the activation event or the email cadence; the other defines the aha moment, reorders so create-first-project becomes step 1, defers theme/notifications/permissions, and prescribes 24h and 72h trigger emails plus per-step funnel tracking.

scenarios.name: Mobile fitness app first-workout dropoff
scenarios.rationale: One response generically suggests shorter forms and push notifications; the other collapses setup to one question, adds a Start-a-Workout-Now empty-state CTA, and lays out a Day 0/1/3 re-engagement sequence keyed to actions taken — applying the skill's one-goal-per-session, do-don't-show, and trigger-based email patterns.
